basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Assistant Project Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Guwahati. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Assistant Project Engineer: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Design. Experience of high precision System design using CAD, electronics interfacing with motor, camera etc. is highly desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Assistant Project Engineer: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Design. Experience of high precision System design using CAD, electronics interfacing with motor, camera etc. is highly desirable.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Salary 2026
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Assistant Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Project Engineer post at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati is 08-07-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before final submission.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Project Engineer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Design. Additional experience in high-precision system design using CAD and electronics interfacing is highly desirable.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Project Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant Project Engineer post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Project Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant Project Engineer post at IIT Guwahati will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Assistant Project Engineer position at IIT Guwahati is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is IIT Guwahati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati is located in Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781039.

faq.question: Q9. What is the walk-in date for the interview?
faq.answer: The interview for the Assistant Project Engineer post is scheduled to be held on 10-07-2026. Candidates are advised to be prepared for this date.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Assam. However, for definitive eligibility regarding domicile, it is recommended to check the official notification PDF.
